action.help_flip: Flips the selected cards or your whole current hand, depending on the All toggle.
action.help_give: Gives the selected cards or your whole hand to the chosen player, depending on the All toggle.
action.help_play_table: Plays the selected cards or your whole hand in front of your hand zone, depending on the All toggle.
action.help_play_zone: Plays the selected cards or your whole hand to the chosen drop zone, depending on the All toggle.
action.play_table: Play in Front of Hand Zone
action.zone_layout_spread_aria: Lay cards side by side on drop zone
app.title: Hand Cards Companion
assign.title: Assigning Player
errors.card_not_in_current_hand: At least one card is no longer in your current hand.
errors.card_not_in_other_hand: At least one card is no longer in the other player's hand.
errors.color_occupied_by_other: {color} is already occupied by another phone.
errors.missing_client_id: This phone could not be identified clearly.
errors.no_drop_zones: No drop zones with a TTSmobile tag are known.
errors.not_controlling_color: You do not control this color.
errors.not_enough_cards: The other player does not have enough cards.
errors.pick_exact_count: Choose exactly the requested number of cards.
errors.request_not_for_you: This request is not for you.
errors.request_not_yours: This request does not belong to you.
errors.request_unavailable: The request is no longer available.
errors.selection_not_for_you: This selection is not for you.
errors.selection_unavailable: The selection is no longer available.
favorite.empty_tap: Hold the star to assign a favorite.
favorite.no_selected_cards: Select at least one card before using this favorite.
favorite.title: Favorite
hand.waiting: Waiting for card data from the game...
interaction.confirm_hint: The other player must confirm the request on their phone.
interaction.title: Player Actions
settings.help_drag: Auto uses Portrait = Swap and Landscape = Move. Swap exchanges two cards. Move places dragged cards at the target position.
settings.help_players: Which players (colors) should be shown as selectable in menus?
settings.help_view: Overlap shows more cards in little space. Side by side shows every card fully with spacing.
settings.hint: Tap to select cards. The card-count button in the header opens actions. Hold for {seconds} seconds to show a card enlarged.
settings.title: Settings
errors.admin_required: Only admins can use this action.
status.info_connected: The phone is connected to Python, and Python has received data from the TTS Lua script.
status.info_lua_disconnected: The phone is connected to Python, but Python has not received any contact from the TTS Lua script since the server started. Load the helper object in TTS or check the Lua server connection.
status.info_disconnected: The phone is not connected to the Python server.
